comment.en: A corrective action performed directly on the device at its location without removing it.

description.undefined: Software Recall_Type: mandatory update to version 2.2.0 resolving FiO2 calibration error. Biomedical engineers visited all affected units within 14 days. Field service documentation required.

comment.undefined: Mandatory software update to correct ventilator calibration.

description.undefined: Customer field notification regarding biotin interference in TSH assay. Updated sample preparation protocol and interference screening algorithm released via software update 4.1.2.

comment.undefined: Field notification regarding interference screening in assays.

description.undefined: Safety communication to implanting cardiologists regarding optimal fixation technique for ACUITY X4 lead. Enhanced fluoroscopy verification protocol at implantation.

comment.undefined: Communication on optimal fixation techniques for cardiac leads.

description.undefined: Security patch 3.0.1 mandatory deployment disabling unrestricted web interface access. Network segmentation guidance issued to hospital IT departments. Penetration test report provided to competent authorities.

comment.undefined: Deployment of security patch to disable unauthorized access.

description.undefined: Enhanced surveillance programme: annual DEXA scan and serum particle monitoring for patients with affected tibial inserts. Patients contacted individually.

comment.undefined: Enhanced surveillance programme for patients with joint implants.

description.undefined: Urgent safety Recall_Type due to elevated metal ion levels. Revision surgery recommended for patients with serum cobalt >7 ppb or symptomatic ALTR. Replacement implants provided.

comment.undefined: Urgent recall of hip implants due to metal ion release.

description.undefined: Urgent safety notice regarding MRI scanning protocol. Updated MRI-conditional guidelines issued. Mandatory reprogramming required before any MRI scan. Programmer software update v3.2 released.

comment.undefined: Safety notice regarding updated MRI-conditional guidelines.

description.undefined: Enhanced calibration protocol issued. Firmware update v1.8.5 mandatory improving temperature compensation algorithm. Patients instructed to perform confirmatory finger-stick at glucose readings <4.5 or >13.9 mmol/L.

comment.undefined: Mandatory firmware update to improve sensor compensation.

description.undefined: Urgent Recall_Type and remote software update. Drug library version 4.3.0 deployed correcting decimal point error. All units verified by biomedical engineering before return to clinical use.

comment.undefined: Urgent recall and software update for infusion pump drug library.

description.undefined: Safety_Alert_Type issued to all implanting centres regarding anticoagulation protocol update for HeartMate 3 to reduce device thrombosis risk. INR target range revised to 2.0–3.0.

comment.undefined: Safety alert regarding anticoagulation protocol updates.

description.undefined: Voluntary Recall_Type of affected Micra AV lots due to premature battery depletion. Replacement units provided. 97% of affected devices successfully replaced.

comment.undefined: Voluntary recall of specific lots due to battery issues.

description.undefined: Safety communication regarding outflow graft kinking risk. Updated surgical technique for graft routing issued. Mandatory follow-up CT at 6 months for patients with affected lot numbers.

comment.undefined: Communication regarding outflow graft routing techniques.

description.undefined: Enhanced deployment training and updated IFU for Portico valve implantation technique. New implantation checklist mandatory for all TAVI centres.

comment.undefined: Field correction involving updated implantation techniques.

description.undefined: Updated IFU regarding post-operative infection prophylaxis protocol. Extended topical antibiotic course (14 days) mandatory post-insertion. Healthcare professionals notified via direct mail and implanting centre visits.

comment.undefined: Updated clinical protocol for infection prophylaxis.

description.undefined: Immediate quarantine and replacement of affected reagent lots. Reflex testing protocol issued. All positive results from affected lots to be re-confirmed. New primer design covering BA.2.86 released.

comment.undefined: Immediate quarantine and replacement of diagnostic reagent lots.

description.undefined: Viva CRT-D delivered inappropriate ICD therapy during MRI scan despite MRI-conditional programming. Patient experienced pain and syncope.

comment.undefined: Inappropriate ICD shock delivery during MRI procedure.

description.undefined: ACUSON Sequoia ultrasound system froze mid-examination. Emergency shutdown required; patient examination incomplete.

comment.undefined: Complete system failure during patient ultrasound examination.

description.undefined: Iluvien implant required surgical removal due to device-related endophthalmitis confirmed by vitreous culture.

comment.undefined: Device-related endophthalmitis requiring implant removal.

description.undefined: HeartMate 3 patient developed severe haemolysis (LDH >2000 U/L) associated with outflow graft kinking confirmed by CT.

comment.undefined: Severe haemolysis associated with device graft kinking.

description.undefined: ACUITY X4 lead dislodgement to right ventricle requiring fluoroscopy-guided repositioning.

comment.undefined: Incident involving lead dislodgement requiring repositioning.

description.undefined: Tivoli II cochlear implant failed to respond to initial activation programming. Sound processor replacement resolved the issue.

comment.undefined: Near-miss incident involving cochlear implant activation failure.

description.undefined: TRITON hip patient presented with elevated serum cobalt (18 ppb). Adverse local tissue reaction (ALTR) confirmed by MRI.

comment.undefined: Report of cobalt toxicity and local tissue reaction.

description.undefined: Persona knee tibial insert showing accelerated polyethylene wear with metallosis confirmed at 3-year revision surgery.

comment.undefined: Adverse tissue reaction caused by accelerated component wear.

description.undefined: 5008S hemodialysis machine web interface exposed to hospital internal network. Unauthorised session accessed alarm configuration.

comment.undefined: Cybersecurity vulnerability exposing device network interface.

description.undefined: Micra AV pacemaker reached elective replacement indicator 14 months earlier than expected longevity specification.

comment.undefined: Malfunction report regarding premature battery depletion.

description.undefined: VIDAS HIV DUO Ultra failed to detect HIV-1 group O infection in seroconversion panel. Patient missed early treatment window.

comment.undefined: Missed detection of HIV-1 group O during seroconversion.

description.undefined: Patient implanted with HeartMate 3 LVAD developed ischemic stroke 6 months post-implant. Device thrombus confirmed by echocardiography.

comment.undefined: Serious injury involving embolic stroke and device thrombus.

description.undefined: cobas SARS-CoV-2 assay failed to detect Omicron BA.2.86 subvariant in 7 samples confirmed positive by sequencing. Lot-specific issue.

comment.undefined: False negative results failing to detect SARS-CoV-2 subvariant.

description.undefined: Plum 360 infusion pump delivered 10x heparin dose due to software decimal point error in drug library version 4.2.1.

comment.undefined: Critical drug overdose due to software decimal point error.

description.undefined: SYNERGY stent fracture detected on angiography 18 months post-implant causing in-stent restenosis.

comment.undefined: Detection of stent fracture causing in-stent restenosis.

description.undefined: Portico valve showed paravalvular leak grade III due to partial migration 2 weeks post-TAVI procedure.

comment.undefined: Surgical intervention required due to valve migration.

description.undefined: OPTIGA CGM sensor reported glucose 3.8 mmol/L while laboratory reference showed 14.2 mmol/L. Patient delayed insulin administration.

comment.undefined: Hyperglycaemic event caused by incorrect CGM glucose reading.

description.undefined: MAGNETOM Vida MRI caused localised skin burn (1st degree) at anterior electrode lead in patient with DBS system not declared prior to scan.

comment.undefined: Localised skin burn during MRI scan due to SAR heating.

description.undefined: cobas e 801 thyroid-stimulating hormone (TSH) assay reported false positive results (>10 mIU/L) in 12 euthyroid patients due to biotin interference.

comment.undefined: False positive results in TSH assay due to interference.

description.undefined: ATERA ventilator software version 2.1.3 delivered FiO2 6% lower than set value for patients in ARDS protocol. 3 patients affected.

comment.undefined: Ventilator software error causing incorrect FiO2 delivery.
